content: I attended the University of Maryland's Munich campus for two years in Munich, Germany.During this time, I might say that my conscious, or at least subconscious, awakening, if you will, started. I took a course in honors English, in which existentialism was the main focus, and much literature was brought to my attention on that subject during that time. Also, I had a profound experience on a mild hit of LSD, during which I flashed into the presence of a white light, seeing nothing else, and my brain being bombarded by a constant flow of information, which was indecipherable to me at that time, and ever since as well, but I had and still have plenty of time to analyze what actually happened during that moment. Let it be said that from my high school years on until threeTime, although I chose to continue usage of both substances until a little over three years ago when I quit both.
